{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323021539D3AE91CB6869D3AD1CA2"}"},"total":28},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7536953338002916158","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书有点群像的味道，算起来应该有4个主角，其中作为女主的韩思雨，初期的人设确实不讨喜，不够从后面来看，她算是本书唯一的一个成长型角色，从团宠小女孩成为了能独当一面的刑警，想对比来说女二落倾城出场的人设就相当惊艳，清澈愚蠢的女大学生，双向情感障碍，天生心理疾病的犯罪心理学专家，对案件执着疯狂只想探寻唯一的真相，可惜落倾城的官配cp是韩邱，换一种方式打开本书，可以看看刑侦队长跟蠢萌警队实习生不得不说的故事。
追凶神探这本书我也看过，其实两本书的差距还挺大的，那本书更偏向现实的案件就是一些很小的琐事引发的冲突，这本书更符合艺术加工也就是大家认为刑侦该有的连环杀人魔。
作为首个破冰案件开场还是有些粗糙的，从第二个案件冰城跳楼案开始引入了表里凶手，双重逻辑的反转推理。
这本书我还是非常推荐的！","text_exts":[{"e":136,"s":131,"text":"犯罪心理学","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%8A%AF%E7%BD%AA%E5%BF%83%E7%90%86%E5%AD%A6&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774203339D3AD1CA2%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227536953338002916158%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227525759261343763480%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%8A%AF%E7%BD%AA%E5%BF%83%E7%90%86%E5%AD%A6%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":209,"s":205,"text":"追凶神探","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%BF%BD%E5%87%B6%E7%A5%9E%E6%8E%A2&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774203339D3AD1CA2%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227536953338002916158%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227525759261343763480%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%BF%BD%E5%87%B6%E7%A5%9E%E6%8E%A2%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":283,"s":280,"text":"杀人魔","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%9D%80%E4%BA%BA%E9%AD%94&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774203339D3AD1CA2%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227536953338002916158%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227525759261343763480%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%9D%80%E4%BA%BA%E9%AD%94%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1754838773,"group_id":"7525759261343763480","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#
